positive: A stylish, minimalist illustration featuring a stylized, cosmic fox spirit (Kitsune) in a dynamic, elegant silhouette. The fox should be surrounded by glowing celestial elements: crescent moons, swirling nebulas, and geometric stars. The overall scene should have a strong sense of depth and movement, rendered in a deep indigo and cosmic teal color palette, accented by glowing gold and silver highlights. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, optimized for seamless repeat printing on fabric. Clean line art meets ethereal digital painting style, inspired by Art Nouveau and modern celestial motifs. High contrast, vector quality, graphic novel aesthetic. Full bleed design, suitable for merchandise.
negative: low detail, blurry, grain, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, monochrome, childish, dirty, cartoonish, poor composition
